eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Plymouth, IA; at 07:10 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 07:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Significant storm damage to Kingsley. Avoid the area. No one is being let into the town at this point.  Residents in the area are advised to stay in their homes.
